name: Mashed Potato Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the mashed potatoes, vanilla, powdered sugar, and coconut; mix well.
2. Chill overnight.
3. Shape into balls and chill again.
4. Melt the chocolate chips and paraffin in a double boiler.
5. Dip candy in the chocolate mixture.
6. Place on waxed paper to set.
